mapper.select: SELECT mission_id FROM MISSION WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND mission_title = 'default_media_mission' AND is_active = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MISSION ( mission_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_title, mission_description, mission_grade, media_type, is_active ) SELECT seq_mission.NEXTVAL, c.parent_id, c.child_id, 'default_media_mission', 'Temporary media mission for upload/review flow', 'low', 'video', 'Y' FROM CHILD c WHERE c.child_id = #{childId}

SELECT seq_mission.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO MISSION ( mission_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_title, mission_description, mission_grade, media_type, is_active ) VALUES ( #{missionId}, #{parentId}, #{childId}, #{missionTitle}, #{missionDescription}, #{missionGrade}, #{mediaType}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( notification_id, child_id, mission_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read ) VALUES ( seq_notification.NEXTVAL, #{childId}, #{missionId}, 'mission_assigned', '새 미션이 도착했어요', #{missionTitle} || ' 미션이 배정되었어요.', 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND is_active = 'Y' AND mission_title != 'default_media_mission'
mapper.update: UPDATE MISSION SET child_id = #{childId}, mission_title = #{missionTitle}, mission_description = #{missionDescription}, mission_grade = #{missionGrade}, media_type = #{mediaType} WHERE mission_id = #{missionId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_active = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms WHERE ms.mission_id = MISSION.mission_id )
mapper.select: SELECT m.mission_id, m.parent_id, m.child_id, m.mission_title, m.mission_description, m.mission_grade, m.media_type, m.is_active, m.created_at, c.nickname child_nickname FROM MISSION m JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = m.child_id WHERE m.parent_id = #{parentId} AND m.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY m.mission_id DESC

SELECT mission_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_title, mission_description, mission_grade, media_type, is_active, created_at FROM MISSION WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY mission_id DESC

SELECT m.mission_id, m.parent_id, m.child_id, m.mission_title, m.mission_description, m.mission_grade, m.media_type, m.is_active, m.created_at, c.nickname child_nickname FROM MISSION m JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = m.child_id WHERE m.mission_id = #{missionId} AND m.parent_id = #{parentId} AND m.is_active = 'Y'

SELECT mission_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_title, mission_description, mission_grade, media_type, is_active, created_at FROM MISSION WHERE mission_id = #{missionId} AND child_id = #{childId} AND is_active = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_mission_submission.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO MISSION_SUBMISSION ( submission_id, mission_id, child_id, mission_date, media_type, media_url, status, reward_given ) VALUES ( #{submissionId}, #{missionId}, #{childId}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), #{mediaType}, #{mediaUrl}, 'pending', 'N' )

INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( notification_id, parent_id, mission_id, submission_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read ) SELECT seq_notification.NEXTVAL, c.parent_id, #{missionId}, #{submissionId}, 'reward_request', '새 인증이 도착했어요', '아이가 미션 인증을 제출했어요. 확인해 주세요.', 'N' FROM CHILD c WHERE c.child_id = #{childId}
mapper.select: SELECT submission_id, mission_id, child_id, mission_date, box_grade, media_type, media_url, status, submitted_at, reviewed_at, reward_given, media_deleted_at FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY submission_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND mission_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND status IN ('pending', 'approved')

SELECT ms.submission_id, ms.mission_id, ms.child_id, ms.mission_date, NVL(ms.box_grade, m.mission_grade) box_grade, ms.media_type, ms.media_url, ms.status, ms.submitted_at, ms.reviewed_at, ms.reward_given, ms.media_deleted_at, c.nickname child_nickname FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = ms.child_id JOIN MISSION m ON m.mission_id = ms.mission_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND ms.status = 'pending' ORDER BY ms.submission_id

SELECT ms.submission_id, ms.mission_id, ms.child_id, ms.mission_date, NVL(ms.box_grade, m.mission_grade) box_grade, ms.media_type, ms.media_url, ms.status, ms.submitted_at, ms.reviewed_at, ms.reward_given, ms.media_deleted_at, c.nickname child_nickname FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = ms.child_id JOIN MISSION m ON m.mission_id = ms.mission_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND ms.mission_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY ms.submission_id DESC
SELECT box_grade, box_name, min_exp, max_exp, pet_drop_rate FROM REWARD_BOX ORDER BY CASE box_grade WHEN 'low' THEN 1 WHEN 'middle' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

SELECT ms.submission_id, ms.mission_id, ms.child_id, ms.mission_date, NVL(ms.box_grade, m.mission_grade) box_grade, ms.media_type, ms.media_url, ms.status, ms.submitted_at, ms.reviewed_at, ms.reward_given, ms.media_deleted_at, c.nickname child_nickname FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms JOIN CHILD c ON c.child_id = ms.child_id JOIN MISSION m ON m.mission_id = ms.mission_id WHERE ms.submission_id = #{submissionId} AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND ms.status = 'pending'

SELECT submission_id, mission_id, child_id, mission_date, box_grade, media_type, media_url, status, submitted_at, reviewed_at, reward_given, media_deleted_at FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND child_id = #{childId} AND status = 'approved' AND reward_given = 'N' AND box_grade IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE MISSION_SUBMISSION SET status = #{status}, box_grade = #{boxGrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reviewed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, media_deleted_at = CASE WHEN #{deleteMedia} = 1 THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE media_deleted_at END WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND status = 'pending' AND child_id IN ( SELECT child_id FROM CHILD WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( notification_id, child_id, mission_id, submission_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read ) VALUES ( seq_notification.NEXTVAL, #{childId}, #{missionId}, #{submissionId}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'approved' THEN 'mission_approved' ELSE 'mission_rejected' END, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'approved' THEN '미션이 승인되었어요' ELSE '인증을 다시 제출해 주세요' END, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'approved' THEN '보호자가 미션을 승인했어요. ' || CASE #{boxGrade} WHEN 'low' THEN '하급' WHEN 'middle' THEN '중급' WHEN 'high' THEN '상급' ELSE #{boxGrade} END || ' 상자를 열 수 있어요.' ELSE '보호자가 인증을 다시 요청했어요. 미션 인증을 다시 제출해 주세요.' END, 'N' )

INSERT INTO REWARD_HISTORY ( reward_id, child_id, submission_id, box_grade, reward_type, reward_source, exp_amount ) VALUES ( seq_reward_history.NEXTVAL, #{childId}, #{submissionId}, #{boxGrade}, 'exp', 'box', #{expAmount} )

INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION ( notification_id, child_id, submission_id, reward_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read ) VALUES ( seq_notification.NEXTVAL, #{childId}, #{submissionId}, #{rewardId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'reward_paid', '보상 상자를 열었어요', '보상 상자에서 EXP ' || #{expAmount} || '를 획득했어요.', 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_id, submission_id, reward_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read, created_at, read_at FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY notification_id DESC

SELECT notification_id, parent_id, child_id, mission_id, submission_id, reward_id, notification_type, title, content, is_read, created_at, read_at FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY notification_id DESC

SELECT c.child_id, c.nickname child_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION m WHERE m.child_id = c.child_id AND m.parent_id = c.parent_id AND m.is_active = 'Y') assigned_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms WHERE ms.child_id = c.child_id AND ms.mission_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ms.status = 'pending') pending_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms WHERE ms.child_id = c.child_id AND ms.mission_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ms.status = 'approved') approved_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms WHERE ms.child_id = c.child_id AND ms.mission_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ms.status = 'rejected') rejected_count FROM CHILD c WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.child_id

SELECT rb.box_grade, rb.box_name, COUNT(ms.submission_id) quantity FROM REWARD_BOX rb LEFT JOIN MISSION_SUBMISSION ms ON ms.box_grade = rb.box_grade AND ms.child_id = #{childId} AND ms.status = 'approved' AND ms.reward_given = 'N' GROUP BY rb.box_grade, rb.box_name ORDER BY CASE rb.box_grade WHEN 'low' THEN 1 WHEN 'middle' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

SELECT activity_type, title, description, status, reference_id, event_at FROM ( SELECT 'submission' activity_type, m.mission_title title, CASE ms.media_type WHEN 'photo' THEN '사진 미션을 제출했어요' ELSE '영상 미션을 제출했어요' END description, ms.status status, ms.submission_id reference_id, ms.submitted_at event_at FROM MISSION_SUBMISSION ms JOIN MISSION m ON m.mission_id = ms.mission_id WHERE ms.child_id = #{childId} UNION ALL SELECT 'reward' activity_type, '보상 상자를 열었어요' title, CASE rh.box_grade WHEN 'low' THEN '하급' WHEN 'middle' THEN '중급' WHEN 'high' THEN '상급' ELSE rh.box_grade END || ' 상자: EXP +' || rh.exp_amount description, 'completed' status, rh.reward_id reference_id, rh.created_at event_at FROM REWARD_HISTORY rh WHERE rh.child_id = #{childId} ) ORDER BY event_at DESC
